description: Building and maintaining features across the stack — React on the front, Express and MongoDB in the back. Integrated real-world APIs like OpenWeather and Leaflet into student-facing apps. SIMS, the college management system I built here, is used by 500+ students daily. Not a demo project.

Fast-paced collaboration, rapid prototyping, and shipping under deadlines. Worked across frontend and backend on internal tools and hackathon builds. This is where Singularity — the Top 8 hackathon project — was born.
End-to-end ownership: design, MERN development, deployment, polish. No handoffs, no excuses. Every project has been a lesson in what it actually takes to ship something you're proud of.
